meaning: n.拨火棍,(用棍)戳的人,纸牌戏vt.烙制
examples: Lon and I play in the same weekly poker game.
Sam boasted that she could beat anyone at poker.
Around that time Kerns met Ma at a poker game set up by a common friend.
Al is an instrument-rated private pilot and has played professional poker for the past three decades.
